title: Vertical Scroll
description: This mod allows you to scroll through your inventory vertically, allowing for easier access of items while playing, without the need of opening your Inventory.
body:
![Preview of swapping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/843fa8e47762d41af084a23be0a966fa296e3a08.gif)
---
  Vertical Scroll

  Hold a modifier key and scroll to cycle items through the vertical column of your selected hotbar slot — no more opening your inventory just to swap what's in hand.

  How it works

  Each hotbar slot has a "column" — the three inventory slots directly above it. While holding the modifier key (default: Left Alt), scrolling rotates items through that column:

  - Scroll up — brings the top item down to your hotbar
  - Scroll down — brings the bottom item up to your hotbar

  The hotbar selection stays put; only the items move.

  HUD overlay

  While the modifier key is held, a small overlay appears above your selected hotbar slot showing the three column slots with their items and stack counts. Arrows (▲ / ▼) indicate which end of the column will cycle to hand.

  Details

  - Modifier key is rebindable — find it under Controls → Vertical Scroll
  - Client-side only — works on any server, no server-side install needed
  - Supports Minecraft 1.21 and above, including all 1.21.x releases and 26.1
